mechanics.excerpt: Though it is indeed under developed industrially and well behind the technology curve compared with the Inner Sphere_ includes scattered regions (nat boast cultural and technological advancement The Taurian Concordat is well known for its excellent educational system and high Iiteracy rate, while the Magistracy of Canopus exem- plifies some of the most progressive views on human rights in known space Periphery-affiliated player character may choose home realm from the descriptions below Or can come from one of the Periphery' countless smaller nations Or unaffiliated worlds_ FREE RASALHAGUE REPUBLIC the mid-twenty-third century; citizens the Federal Republics of Norway; Sweden and Finland emigrated Rasalhague planet far from Terra escape oppression: Though conquered by the expanding Draconis Combine and ruled by that realm for centuries the fiercely independent Rasalhagians preserved their customs and rebelled against their conquerors at every opportunity: Following the Fourth Succession War, 3034 Haakon Magnusson declared the tormation the Free Rasalhague Republic with the support of ComStar: The Lyran Commonwealth and Draconis Combine acknowledged the Republic and gave up control of ancestral Rasalhague worlds within their Own borders.
